Author: Wandering Idiot
Name: FATE Atlas
Punchline: Find level-appropriate FATE areas and track active FATEs.
Description: Provides a level-aware FATE leveling directory, direct teleport buttons for unlocked aetherytes, and a live current-area FATE pane with level, progress, remaining time, and click-to-map functionality.
Changelog: Fixed Active FATE pane close and reopen behavior.
